description: This image is a screenshot of a user interface modal dialog box titled "Publish Ingestion 'UA18_IBK'". The dialog explains that "Publishing 'UA18_IBK' will make it accessible for other users within CLC+ Core according to the visibility that you define - Please select the preferred visibility setting:". Below this, there is a dropdown menu labelled "Visibility", which currently displays "Public - All Organisations". A warning message states: "Please be aware that it is possible to edit an Ingestion until it is used within an Extraction in status 'EXTRACTED'. Once it is used in an Extraction, the status of the Ingestion will change to 'USED'." The dialog box contains two action buttons: "CANCEL" and a green-highlighted "PUBLISH".
